audiobook.addEditionHelp: Add another edition — for example a cheaper AI-narrated version alongside a human-narrated one. The title and description tell listeners them apart.
audiobook.createIntro: Publish a narrated edition of {storyTitle} — upload a full-book recording or per-chapter narration, add narrators, and set its own pricing.
audiobook.danger.delete.aria: Confirmation modal for deleting an audio book edition
audiobook.danger.delete.desc: Permanently deletes this audio book edition, including its narration files, tracks, and analytics. This cannot be undone.
audiobook.danger.delete.title: Delete edition
audiobook.danger.delete.warning: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
audiobook.danger.makePrivate.aria: Confirmation modal for making an audio book edition private
audiobook.danger.makePrivate.desc: Making this edition private removes it from discovery and search. People who bought it or added it to their library keep access. New listeners can no longer find or buy it.
audiobook.danger.makePrivate.title: Make edition private
audiobook.danger.makePrivate.warning: This edition will be hidden from discovery and search. Existing buyers and library owners keep access.
audiobook.danger.makePublic.aria: Confirmation modal for making an audio book edition public
audiobook.danger.makePublic.desc: This edition is currently private. Existing buyers and library owners keep access. Making it public lists it in discovery and lets new listeners buy it again.
audiobook.danger.makePublic.title: Make edition public
audiobook.danger.makePublic.warning: This edition will be discoverable again and available for new listeners to buy.
audiobook.externalUrlHelp: Or link to an external audio file (free / public-domain editions only).
audiobook.freePreviewHelp: Number of opening chapters playable for free.
audiobook.fullBookWhenFinished: Upload a full-book recording once the story is finished.
audiobook.manager.intro: You manage the production of this audio book. Pricing, revenue split, and team are handled by the owner.
audiobook.newEditionPlaceholder: e.g. AI narrated, or Read by the author
audiobook.offlineUnsupported: Offline storage is not available in this browser.
audiobook.openExternal: This audio can’t play inline here — open it in a new tab
audiobook.pricing.chapterHelp: Listeners can buy a single chapter's narration. Can be sold alongside the full book.
audiobook.searchChapters: Search chapters by number or title…
audiobook.settings.isAIGenerated: Is this audio book narrated by AI?
audiobook.settings.isAIGeneratedTooltip: Let listeners know if AI voices were used to narrate this edition. We use this for proper labeling.
audiobook.settings.languageHelp: Choose which language edition of the story this audio book narrates.
audiobook.settings.makeFreeHelp: Free editions hide pricing and are never sold. Any prices you set are cleared.
audiobook.settings.multiEditionHelp: Use these when a story has multiple audio books (e.g. a human-narrated and an AI-narrated edition, or editions by different teams) so listeners can tell them apart.
audiobook.split.author: Author
audiobook.splitHelp: Share of the creator payout for each recipient. Must total 100%. Narrators need Stripe payouts configured to receive a share.
audiobook.stats.summary: {minutes} minutes listened across {listeners, plural, one {# listener} other {# listeners}}
audiobook.stats.title: Listening analytics
audiobook.stores.help: Link out to stores where listeners can buy or stream this edition elsewhere (Audible, Kobo, Apple Books, and more). Add as many as you like; set a language to show a link only for that language edition.
audiobook.stores.title: External stores
audiobook.team.agreement.error: Could not record your agreement. Please try again.
audiobook.team.agreement.title: Role agreement
audiobook.team.removeFailed: Could not remove the team member.
audiobook.team.splitHelp: The proposed revenue share is shown to the invitee in their role agreement. Set the actual split in the Audio book pricing section once they have joined and configured Stripe payouts.
audiobook.team.title: Audio book team
